summary: Recording of a DHS podium event announcing the reopening of ICE's VOICE office, with Secretary Noem and victims' family members holding framed photos of relatives, intercut with seated interview testimonials from those families. It carries no music track. On-screen text reads 'Victims of Immigration Crime Engagement' and '855-48-VOICE (855-488-6423)', a caption identifies the voice of Patricia Quets, mother of Nicholas Quets, and the U.S. Department of Homeland Security seal appears.
notable_text: Victims of Immigration Crime Engagement; 855-48-VOICE (855-488-6423); *Voice of Patricia Quets, mother of Nicholas Quets; U.S. Department of Homeland Security seal
